metadata.description: Batch 45 — additional Oxford 5000 words 1401-1500; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: the rate at which useful work or output is produced
words.example: Automation increased inspection productivity.

words.definitionEn: producing financial gain
words.example: The proposal must be technically sound and profitable.

words.definitionEn: having deep meaning or influence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “profound”.

words.definitionEn: the activity of writing computer instructions
words.definitionTh: การเขียนโปรแกรม
words.example: PLC programming controls the reject sequence.

words.definitionEn: supporting gradual improvement or reform
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “progressive”.

words.definitionEn: to officially forbid something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prohibit”.

words.definitionEn: an estimate of a future amount or an image cast forward
words.definitionTh: การคาดการณ์ / การฉาย
words.example: Use the trend for the annual projection.

words.definitionEn: important and well known
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prominent”.

words.definitionEn: showing signs of future success
words.definitionTh: มีแนวโน้มดี
words.example: The first trial produced promising results.

words.definitionEn: movement to a higher position or public support
words.definitionTh: การส่งเสริม
words.example: Document the product-promotion plan.

words.definitionEn: to cause someone to act or respond
words.example: The alarm prompts the operator to act.

words.definitionEn: very noticeable or strongly marked
words.example: The defect pattern became more pronounced.

words.definitionEn: information designed to influence public opinion
words.definitionTh: การโฆษณาชวนเชื่อ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “propaganda”.

words.definitionEn: a part compared with the whole
words.example: Calculate the proportion of rejected products.

words.definitionEn: a formal suggestion or statement
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “proposition”.

words.definitionEn: to bring legal action against someone
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prosecute”.

words.definitionEn: the process of conducting a legal case
words.definitionTh: การดำเนินคดี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prosecution”.

words.definitionEn: a lawyer representing the state in a criminal case
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prosecutor”.

words.definitionEn: expected or likely to become something in future
words.definitionTh: ที่คาดหวังในอนาคต
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prospective”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being successful and wealthy
words.definitionTh: ความเจริญรุ่งเรือง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prosperity”.

words.definitionEn: intended to prevent damage or injury
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “protective”.

words.definitionEn: a nutrient needed for body growth and repair
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “protein”.

words.definitionEn: a person taking part in a public protest
words.definitionTh: ผู้ประท้วง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “protester”.

words.definitionEn: an agreed system of rules for a process
words.definitionTh: ระเบียบวิธี
words.example: Follow the validation protocol.

words.definitionEn: a major administrative area of a country
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “province”.

words.definitionEn: relating to an area outside the main center
words.definitionTh: ส่วนภูมิภาค
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “provincial”.

words.definitionEn: an arrangement or supply prepared for a need
words.definitionTh: ข้อกำหนด / การจัดหา
words.example: Include a provision for future expansion.

words.definitionEn: to cause a reaction or strong response
words.definitionTh: กระตุ้นให้เกิด
words.example: Excess heat can provoke a shutdown.

words.definitionEn: relating to mental illness and its treatment
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “psychiatric”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the mind and behavior
words.definitionTh: ทางจิตวิทยา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “psychological”.

words.definitionEn: public attention created for a person or product
words.definitionTh: การประชาสัมพันธ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “publicity”.

words.definitionEn: the business of producing books or information
words.definitionTh: การตีพิมพ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “publishing”.

words.definitionEn: the regular beat of blood or a short signal
words.example: Measure the encoder pulse.

words.definitionEn: a device moving fluid; to move fluid
words.example: The pump circulates cooling water.

words.definitionEn: a hit with the fist or a tool making holes
words.definitionTh: หมัด / ต่อย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “punch”.

words.definitionEn: a style or person linked to rebellious music culture
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “punk”.

words.definitionEn: completely and without other elements
words.definitionTh: อย่างแท้จริง
words.example: The decision was based purely on data.

words.definitionEn: the act of trying to achieve or obtain something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pursuit”.

words.definitionEn: a problem designed to test thought
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “puzzle”.

words.definitionEn: a request for information in a system
words.example: Run a query against the defect database.

words.definitionEn: a long search for something important
words.definitionTh: ภารกิจค้นหา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “quest”.

words.definitionEn: a written set of questions for collecting data
words.example: Use a questionnaire to collect operator feedback.

words.definitionEn: a fixed permitted amount
words.example: The system met the production quota.

words.definitionEn: relating to race or ethnic group
words.definitionTh: ทางเชื้อชาติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “racial”.

words.definitionEn: unfair belief or treatment based on race
words.definitionTh: การเหยียดเชื้อชาติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “racism”.

words.definitionEn: a person with racist beliefs
words.definitionTh: ผู้เหยียดเชื้อชาติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “racist”.

words.definitionEn: a system detecting objects with radio waves
words.example: Radar detects objects at a distance.

words.definitionEn: energy transmitted as waves or particles
words.example: Shield the sensor from heat radiation.

words.definitionEn: extreme or affecting fundamental change
words.definitionTh: รุนแรง / ถอนราก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “radical”.

words.definitionEn: intense uncontrolled anger
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rage”.

words.definitionEn: a sudden attack; to attack a place
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “raid”.

words.definitionEn: a metal bar or railway track
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rail”.

words.definitionEn: a public gathering or renewed recovery
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rally”.

words.definitionEn: chosen without a fixed pattern
words.example: Select a random sample for validation.

words.definitionEn: a position in an ordered list
words.definitionTh: การจัดอันดับ
words.example: Review the supplier ranking.

words.definitionEn: a serious criminal act of forced sexual violence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rape”.

words.definitionEn: a small rodent
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rat”.

words.definitionEn: a score showing quality or performance
words.example: The enclosure has an IP rating.

words.definitionEn: a relationship between two numerical quantities
words.example: Calculate the defect ratio.

words.definitionEn: based on reason and logic
words.example: Use a rational scoring method.

words.definitionEn: a narrow beam of light or energy
words.definitionTh: รังสี / ลำแสง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ray”.

words.definitionEn: easily and without delay
words.definitionTh: อย่างพร้อม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “readily”.

words.definitionEn: the act of understanding something clearly
words.definitionTh: การตระหนักรู้
words.example: The trial led to the realization that lighting was critical.

words.definitionEn: an area of activity, knowledge, or influence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “realm”.

words.definitionEn: the back part of something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rear”.

words.definitionEn: in a fair or sensible way
words.definitionTh: อย่างสมเหตุสมผล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reasonably”.

words.definitionEn: the process of forming conclusions logically
words.definitionTh: การให้เหตุผล
words.example: Document the reasoning behind each score.

words.definitionEn: to restore someone’s confidence
words.definitionTh: ทำให้มั่นใจ
words.example: The test results reassure the project team.

words.definitionEn: a person opposing authority
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rebel”.

words.definitionEn: organized resistance against authority
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rebellion”.

words.definitionEn: to build again after damage
words.example: Rebuild the model with verified data.

words.definitionEn: a device or person that receives signals
words.definitionTh: เครื่องรับ
words.example: Check the wireless receiver signal.

words.definitionEn: a period of reduced economic activity
words.definitionTh: ภาวะเศรษฐกิจถดถอย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “recession”.

words.definitionEn: a person who receives something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “recipient”.

words.definitionEn: to think or calculate informally
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reckon”.

words.definitionEn: the act of identifying value or achievement
words.example: The model performs pattern recognition.

words.definitionEn: the process of building again
words.definitionTh: การสร้างใหม่
words.example: The system supports 3D reconstruction.

words.definitionEn: to tell the details of an event again
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “recount”.

words.definitionEn: the process of returning to normal
words.definitionTh: การฟื้นตัว
words.example: Test system recovery after power loss.

words.definitionEn: to find and bring in new members or employees
words.example: Recruit trained technicians for the project.

words.definitionEn: the process of hiring new people
words.example: The recruitment process requires technical screening.

words.definitionEn: an official controlling a sports match
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “referee”.

words.definitionEn: a public vote on a specific issue
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “referendum”.

words.definitionEn: an image in a surface or careful thought
words.example: Reduce reflection from the wet surface.

words.definitionEn: a change intended to improve a system
words.example: The project supports process reform.

words.definitionEn: a safe place giving protection
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “refuge”.

words.definitionEn: a person forced to leave home for safety
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “refugee”.

words.definitionEn: the act of refusing or not accepting
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “refusal”.

words.definitionEn: to get back something previously lost
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “regain”.

words.definitionEn: without being affected by circumstances
words.definitionTh: โดยไม่คำนึงถึง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “regardless”.

words.definitionEn: a system or government in power
words.definitionTh: ระบอบการปกครอง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “regime”.

words.definitionEn: the process of officially recording details
words.definitionTh: การลงทะเบียน
words.example: Complete equipment registration.

words.definitionEn: to control an activity by rules
words.example: The controller regulates temperature.

words.definitionEn: a person or body controlling an industry
words.definitionTh: หน่วยงานกำกับ
words.example: The pressure regulator requires calibration.

words.definitionEn: relating to official rules and controls
words.definitionTh: ทางกฎระเบียบ
words.example: Review all regulatory requirements.

words.definitionEn: the process of restoring health or function
words.example: The equipment needs structural rehabilitation.

words.definitionEn: the period a ruler holds power; to rule
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reign”.

words.definitionEn: to make stronger with additional support
words.definitionTh: เสริมกำลัง
words.example: Reinforce the camera bracket.

words.definitionEn: the act of refusing or not accepting
words.example: Analyze every rejection event.

words.definitionEn: the degree to which something relates to a subject
words.definitionTh: ความเกี่ยวข้อง
words.example: Check the relevance of each criterion.
